loginView.p1: uses progressive web app technolog that combines the best features of traditional websites and platform-specific apps
loginView.addressUsed: This address has been used by other twitter, please change another one in your wallet.
loginView.registerRequire: We will help you create a web3 social account and delegate posting key permissions to our account. Due to the cost of registering a web3 social account, we will cost your fee for registration. If you have ENS or Bitip, we will help you register for free.
loginView.noBitip: Not yet have one? Click here to

profileView.captureDesc: A portion of the trade fees generated by users trading tokens will be injected into the IPShare of the connector

createCommunity.initAmountTip: Input how many TagCoin you wanna buy first.
createCommunity.tickUsed: This name has been registed, please change to another one

buyAndSell.tweetTip: You must create social account to tweet.
buyAndSell.blinkTip: You can make blink to Twitter if you have created IPShare, user trade tag from your blink can bring you reward.

community.distributionTip: The total amount of tokens is distributed through three parts, including 15% for social distribution, 70% for bonding curve sales, and 15% for entering the liquidity pool

community.spaceInvalidLink: It's not a valid space link

curation.tweetWithTickTip: Write something about {tick}, you can earn {tick} if someone like your tweet.
curation.vpDesc: Like/Retweet a tweet will cost you vp(voting power). And you can earn tagcoin after 3 days.
curation.opDesc: All tweet operation(like/retweet/quote/reply will cost you op(operation power) because of all the operation will sync to the blockchain.
curation.curationTip: Curate a tweet or as a speaker of a space can gain curate rewards. Write a tweet or host a space can gain creator rewards. When the tagcoin listed, you can claim all this tagcoin rewards.

ipshare.desc: Create IPShare, become a personal IP, receive support, and earn IPShare transaction fees.
